features.title: Why Kiro?
features.item1_desc: Chat without language barriers thanks to instant translation.
features.item2_desc: Find and connect with profiles linked to TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook.
features.item3_desc: Simple and affordable premium options to enhance your experience.
features.item4_desc: Meet without revealing your personal info.

partnerships.point2: Grow your community by attracting an engaged audience.
partnerships.point3: Accessible to everyone, with no need to already be a star.
